metadata.name: summer_cooling
metadata.description: Summer ventilation scenario: single-room apartment, hot indoor air (32°C), cooler outside (25°C), one window on the north wall. Fan placed near the window blowing outward — helps push hot air out and draw cool air in. Goal: cool the room to 28°C. Try moving the fan (position/direction) to compare cooling speed.

metadata.name: summer_cooling
metadata.description:
Summer ventilation: hot room (32°C), cool outside (25°C). Window (north wall) + entrance door cracked open (south wall) = cross-ventilation. Fan near the window, blowing inward (-y), draws cool outside air through the window into the room, hot air exits through the door. Goal: find the best fan position to cool the room to 30°C as fast as possible. Compare: try fan.direction [270, 0] (blowing -y, pulls air from window side)
         vs     fan.direction [90, 0]  (blowing +y, pushes air toward window).

metadata.name: summer_cooling
metadata.description:
Summer ventilation: hot room (32°C), cool outside (25°C). Window (north wall) + entrance door cracked open (south wall) = cross-ventilation. Fan near the window, blowing inward (-y), draws cool outside air through the window into the room, hot air exits through the door. Goal: find the best fan position to cool the room to 30°C as fast as possible. Compare: try fan.direction [270, 0] (blowing -y, pulls air from window side)
         vs     fan.direction [90, 0]  (blowing +y, pushes air toward window).
